race.name: Marathon de Bessans
race.tagline: Sixty kilometers at 1,750 meters in the high Maurienne valley — France's altitude crucible that opens the European marathon season before anyone else has even waxed.

vitals.aid_stations: 5 feed stations with hot drinks, dried fruit, energy food, and French mountain cheese

climate.description: Mid-January at 1,750 meters in the Maurienne valley means intense cold and reliable deep snow. Temperatures range from -18°C to -5°C. The high altitude guarantees snow conditions but the cold demands serious preparation. Clear skies bring stunning views but also rapid radiant cooling.
challenges: Extreme cold at 1,750m altitude in January
Altitude effects on performance — thin air at race pace
Early-season fitness test — January date catches many underprepared
Sun-shade temperature differentials on valley loops

course.primary: A multi-loop course through the high Maurienne valley at 1,750 meters altitude. The terrain is rolling with moderate climbs through alpine meadows and sparse larch forests. Surrounded by glaciated peaks of the Vanoise National Park. The altitude is the defining challenge — sustained effort at nearly 6,000 feet.
course.surface: Machine-groomed tracks on high-altitude alpine plateau
course.grooming: French national team training venue — excellent grooming standards
features: Season opener — first major European marathon of the winter
Surrounded by glaciated peaks of the Vanoise massif
Bessans is a French national team training base
January date guarantees cold, fast snow

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum altitude score at 1,750m — the highest venue on the Euroloppet circuit. Guaranteed snow and Vanoise scenery earn top marks. Remote Savoie location and moderate field size limit accessibility scores.

history.summary: Founded in 1979, the Marathon de Bessans has served as Europe's season-opening ski marathon for over four decades. Set at 1,750 meters in the Maurienne valley of Savoie, the event benefits from Bessans' status as a French biathlon and cross-country national team training center. The high altitude guarantees snow when lower venues struggle, making it the traditional January curtain-raiser for the European marathon circuit.
notable_facts: Highest venue on the Euroloppet circuit at 1,750m
Season opener — traditionally the first major European marathon each winter
Bessans is a French national team training base for biathlon and XC skiing
Founded in 1979 — over 45 years of continuous racing
Adjacent to Vanoise National Park, France's first national park

videos.title: Highlights from Marathon International de Bessans 2026
videos.description:
Highlights from Marathon International de Bessans 2026

The Ski Classics Challengers event, Marathon International de Bessans, took place last Saturday, January 10, with a 30km long-distance ski race in classic technique in Bessans, France. Watch the highlights here!

videos.title: L'édition 2026 du Marathon international de Bessans
videos.description:
Le Marathon International de Bessans a lancé son édition 2026 dans des conditions hivernales extrêmes, avec vent, froid et neige tourbillonnante lors des épreuves classiques de samedi. Dans ce contexte dantesque, le Norvégien Thomas Oedegaarden s’est imposé en solitaire sur 30 km, tandis que Daphné Patois a remporté la course féminine. Le dimanche, pour l’épreuve de skating disputée dans des conditions plus clémentes, Camille Coupé et Gérard Agnellet ont signé des victoires nettes. Cette 47e édition a rassemblé un nombre record de 1 890 participants et marqué le lancement du nouveau 60 km, confirmant le dynamisme du nordique à Bessans.

Nordic TV, la télé So nordic.

© Nordic TV
Photo : Nils Louna
videos.curation_reason: Recent race coverage from 2026 showing extreme winter conditions and race results.

videos.title: Marathon International de Bessans - Le style classique
Bessans : Près de 1 500 fondeurs pour la 45ème édition du Marathon International de Bessans
videos.description:
🏔️ SPORT : Près de 1 500 fondeurs pour la 45ème édition du Marathon International de Bessans 🏔️

Le marathon de Bessans est devenu une institution pour le monde du ski de fond, où chaque année les élites et les amateurs se retrouvent pour un week-end de compétition en Haute Maurienne.

Ce dimanche se tenaient les épreuves du 42 km, du 23 km et du 10 km. 

Sur le marathon, c’est le quadruple médaillé olympique Maurice MANIFICAT qui l’emporte. Emilie BULLE est première féminine.

Sur le 23 km, c’est le Savoyard Elio ARRIAND qui s’impose, ainsi que Maëlle VEYRE du Ski Club Montgenèvre Val Clarée.

Sur le 10 km, Antoine COLLOMB-PATTON, vainqueur, se prépare pour les Deaflympics, des Jeux réservés aux sourds qui se tiendront en mars en Turquie. Namou CANDAU-ARMAND, de Bauges Ski Nordique, l’emporte largement.

#Savoie #Sport #Ski #Bessans #HMV #HauteMaurienneVanoise #Marathon #Marathondebessans
videos.curation_reason: Comprehensive race coverage from 2024 showing the scale and atmosphere of the event with 1,500 participants.

Here we go again !
After a Christmas break we our respective families Thomas came back to France !
The plan ? 10 days altitude in Bessans, Savoie Département, the place to be as a cross country skier.
We end up this week with a Ski Classics Challenger : Le marathon de Bessans 30km in storm conditions with my family, best team ever.
